expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子用的板材尺寸。 [Width],[Height],[Depth] 是总尺寸；[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabin. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran menyeluruh, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là tổng kích thước, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga laki ng board para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height],[Depth] ay kabuuang Sukatan, ang [BoardThick] ay Top, Bottom at Side Board na kapal ng materyal, at ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကဘိနက်အတွက်ပိဋကဋ်အတိုင်းအထွာများဖော်တွက်သည်။ [Width], [Height],[Depth] သည် စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်ထိပ်၊ အောက်နှင့်ဘေးဘုတ် မထည်အထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည် နောက်ခံဘုတ် မထည်အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាលេខវិមាត្រនៃប៊ិចសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ជាវិមាត្រសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាសុទ្ធវត្ថុធាតុសំរាប់ផ្ទាំងលើ, ខាងក្រោម និងទូមួយៗ, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាសុទ្ធវត្ថុធាតុសំរាប់ផ្ទាំងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດແຜ່ນສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດລວມ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງແຜ່ນຂ້າງໃນ, ຂ້າງລຸ່ມ ແລະດ້ານຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງແຜ່ນພື້ນຫຼັງ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネット用の板のサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は全体の寸法を表し、[BoardThick] は上部、底部、および側板の素材の厚さを表し、[BackBoardThick] は背景板の素材の厚さを表します。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 크기를 나타내며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드의 재료 두께를 나타내고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드의 재료 두께를 나타냅니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medición total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material para las tablas superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material para la tabla de fondo. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] correspond aux dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau pour les panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau pour le panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] ऊपर, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала для верхних, нижних и боковых панелей, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала для задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
